## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Component

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] DevOps/CI/CD

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem this feature would solve -->
<!-- Example: I'm always frustrated when [...] -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## User Story

<!-- Optional: Write a user story -->
<!-- As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit] -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like for this feature -->

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Design Mockups

<!-- If applicable, add mockups or wireframes -->

## Technical Considerations

<!-- Any technical details, dependencies, or constraints -->

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (Must have for launch)
- [ ] High (Important for user experience)
- [ ] Medium (Nice to have)
- [ ] Low (Future consideration)

## Milestone

<!-- Which milestone should this be part of? -->

- [ ] Milestone 1: Scanner UI
- [ ] Milestone 2: Gemini Vision Integration
- [ ] Milestone 3: Abbreviation Engine
